changes: The ecosystem watch was expanded from a small starter set into a canonical multi-tier tracked set.
Hermes is now pinned to NousResearch/hermes-agent and tracked as a high-signal adjacent competitor / close conceptual neighbor.
The daily scan now covers Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 targets instead of just OpenClaw, PicoClaw, and Perplexity.
The scan was hardened against GitHub unauthenticated API rate limits so the daily job can continue using README-level evidence when metadata calls fail.
A daily cron now maintains the ecosystem watch and only posts into the topic when there is a materially meaningful update.
whyItMatters: We now have a stable operating map of the ecosystem rather than ad hoc research.
Hermes adds an important differentiator to the watch: the self-improving learning-loop agent narrative.
The watch is now structured to separate durable strategy from daily movement.
